title: cornus foemina
intro: Cornus foemina, also known as Stag's Horn Sumach, is a plant species that belongs to the dogwood family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including diarrhea, dysentery, and eczema, thanks to its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe irritated skin. Herbal preparations of Cornus foemina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to alleviate digestive issues.
